title: Find 1 on the number line
description: Locate 1 on a number line labeled with 0 and a unit fraction.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $7$ fourths.


[[☃ image 1]]

$4$ fourths equals $1$ whole.


[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac44$.


[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $4$ thirds.


[[☃ image 1]]

$3$ thirds equals $1$ whole.


[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac{3}{3}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $5$ fourths.



[[☃ image 1]]

$4$ fourths equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac44$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $5$ halves.



[[☃ image 1]]

$2$ halves equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]



We move the dot to $\dfrac22$ on the number line.  



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $9$ eighths.



[[☃ image 1]]

$8$ eighths equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac88$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $7$ sixths.


[[☃ image 1]]

$6$ sixths equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac{6}{6}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The length of the number line is $3$ halves.


[[☃ image 1]]

$2$ halves equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac22$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by halves.



[[☃ image 1]]

$2$ halves equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac{2}{2}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**


[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by thirds.



[[☃ image 1]]

$3$ thirds equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac33$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**


[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by fourths.


[[☃ image 1]]

$4$ fourths equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**


[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by sixths.



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to $1$ on the number line.**


[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by eighths.



[[☃ image 1]]

$8$ eighths equals $1$ whole.



[[☃ image 1]]

The number $1$ is at the point $\dfrac88$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which point is at $1$ on the number line?**  



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The number line counts by fourths.



[[☃ image 1]]

$4$ fourths equals $1$ whole.

[[☃ image 1]]

Point $\redE{C}$ is at $\dfrac{4}{4}$, which equals $1$.



[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A number line that has, moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, a tick mark at one-fourth, a tick mark at point A,  a tick mark at point B,  a tick mark at point C, a tick mark at point D, two unlabeled tick marks, and an unlabeled ending tick mark.
